---
title: "Research Overview"
subtitle: "Flight Delay Prediction — Three Generations of Experiments"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    page-layout: full
    smooth-scroll: true
---

```{=html}
<style>
.node rect { transition: opacity 0.15s; }
.node:hover rect { opacity: 0.75; }
.node { cursor: pointer; }
.c-gray rect  { fill: #F1EFE8; stroke: #5F5E5A; }
.c-gray .th   { fill: #2C2C2A; }
.c-gray .ts   { fill: #5F5E5A; }
.c-red rect   { fill: #FCEBEB; stroke: #A32D2D; }
.c-red .th    { fill: #501313; }
.c-red .ts    { fill: #A32D2D; }
.c-purple rect { fill: #EEEDFE; stroke: #534AB7; }
.c-purple .th  { fill: #26215C; }
.c-purple .ts  { fill: #534AB7; }
.c-teal rect  { fill: #E1F5EE; stroke: #0F6E56; }
.c-teal .th   { fill: #04342C; }
.c-teal .ts   { fill: #0F6E56; }
.c-blue rect  { fill: #E6F1FB; stroke: #185FA5; }
.c-blue .th   { fill: #042C53; }
.c-blue .ts   { fill: #185FA5; }
.c-coral rect { fill: #FAECE7; stroke: #993C1D; }
.c-coral .th  { fill: #4A1B0C; }
.c-coral .ts  { fill: #993C1D; }
.c-amber rect { fill: #FAEEDA; stroke: #854F0B; }
.c-amber .th  { fill: #412402; }
.c-amber .ts  { fill: #854F0B; }
.th { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; font-family: sans-serif; }
.ts { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 400; font-family: sans-serif; }
@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
  svg { color: #ddd; }
  .c-gray rect  { fill: #444441; stroke: #B4B2A9; }
  .c-gray .th   { fill: #F1EFE8; }
  .c-gray .ts   { fill: #B4B2A9; }
  .c-red rect   { fill: #791F1F; stroke: #F09595; }
  .c-red .th    { fill: #FCEBEB; }
  .c-red .ts    { fill: #F09595; }
  .c-purple rect { fill: #3C3489; stroke: #AFA9EC; }
  .c-purple .th  { fill: #EEEDFE; }
  .c-purple .ts  { fill: #AFA9EC; }
  .c-teal rect  { fill: #085041; stroke: #5DCAA5; }
  .c-teal .th   { fill: #E1F5EE; }
  .c-teal .ts   { fill: #5DCAA5; }
  .c-blue rect  { fill: #0C447C; stroke: #85B7EB; }
  .c-blue .th   { fill: #E6F1FB; }
  .c-blue .ts   { fill: #85B7EB; }
  .c-coral rect { fill: #712B13; stroke: #F0997B; }
  .c-coral .th  { fill: #FAECE7; }
  .c-coral .ts  { fill: #F0997B; }
  .c-amber rect { fill: #633806; stroke: #EF9F27; }
  .c-amber .th  { fill: #FAEEDA; }
  .c-amber .ts  { fill: #EF9F27; }
}
</style>

<svg width="100%" viewBox="0 0 680 920">
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto-start-reverse">
      <path d="M2 1L8 5L2 9" fill="none" stroke="context-stroke" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <!-- GEN 1 -->
  <g class="node c-gray" onclick="window.location.href='gen1-en.html'" style="cursor:pointer">
    <rect x="220" y="20" width="240" height="56" rx="8" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text class="th" x="340" y="42" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Gen1: Selective Prediction</text>
    <text class="ts" x="340" y="60" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">AA Snowflake | 2.7M flights | AUC 0.928</text>
  </g>
  <!-- ETD leakage badge -->
  <g class="node c-red" onclick="window.location.href='gen1-en.html#etd-leakage'" style="cursor:pointer">
    <rect x="476" y="32" width="168" height="44" rx="8" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text class="th" x="560" y="50" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">ETD Leakage Found</text>
    <text class="ts" x="560" y="66" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Inflated AUC → All invalidated</text>
  </g>
  <line x1="460" y1="48" x2="478" y2="48" stroke="#E24B4A" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrow)" fill="none"/>
  <line x1="340" y1="76" x2="340" y2="114" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrow)" fill="none"/>
  <text x="354" y="100" font-size="12" dominant-baseline="central">Rebuild</text>
  <!-- GEN 2 HEADER -->
  <g class="node c-purple" onclick="window.location.href='gen2-en.html'" style="cursor:pointer">
    <rect x="160" y="114" width="360" height="44" rx="8" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text class="th" x="340" y="130" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Gen2: Systematic Feature Engineering</text>
    <text class="ts" x="340" y="146" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">AA DFW | 804K flights | Strict temporal split</text>
  </g>
  <line x1="260" y1="158" x2="185" y2="192" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrow)" fill="none"/>
  <line x1="340" y1="158" x2="340" y2="192" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrow)" fill="none"/>
  <line x1="420" y1="158" x2="495" y2="192" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrow)" fill="none"/>
  <!-- LEFT: V1 -->
  <g class="node c-gray" onclick="window.location.href='gen2-en.html#v1'" style="cursor:pointer">
    <rect x="40" y="192" width="290" height="44" rx="8" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text class="th" x="185" y="208" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">V1 Baseline</text>
    <text class="ts" x="185" y="224" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Schedule + METAR + tail chain | AUC 0.717</text>
  </g>
  <line x1="185" y1="236" x2="185" y2="260" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrow)" fill="none"/>
  <!-- V2 -->
  <g class="node c-teal" onclick="window.location.href='gen2-en.html#v2'" style="cursor:pointer">
    <rect x="40" y="260" width="290" height="44" rx="8" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text class="th" x="185" y="276" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">V2 Literature features</text>
    <text class="ts" x="185" y="292" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Multi-hop tail + congestion | +0.019</text>
  </g>
  <line x1="185" y1="304" x2="185" y2="328" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrow)" fill="none"/>
  <!-- V3-V5 -->
  <g class="node c-gray" onclick="window.location.href='gen2-en.html#v3v5'" style="cursor:pointer">
    <rect x="40" y="328" width="290" height="56" rx="8" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text class="th" x="185" y="348" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">V3-V5 Internal recombination</text>
    <text class="ts" x="185" y="364" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Two-stage / BTS stats / Dest METAR</text>
    <text class="ts" x="185" y="378" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Same-source re-encoding all failed</text>
  </g>
  <!-- RIGHT: V6 -->
  <g class="node c-gray" onclick="window.location.href='gen2-en.html#v6'" style="cursor:pointer">
    <rect x="350" y="192" width="290" height="44" rx="8" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text class="th" x="495" y="208" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">V6 SHAP selection + Optuna</text>
    <text class="ts" x="495" y="224" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">49 → 35 features | +0.005</text>
  </g>
  <line x1="495" y1="236" x2="495" y2="260" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrow)" fill="none"/>
  <!-- V7-V8 -->
  <g class="node c-gray" onclick="window.location.href='gen2-en.html#v7v8'" style="cursor:pointer">
    <rect x="350" y="260" width="290" height="56" rx="8" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text class="th" x="495" y="278" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">V7-V8 Redundant features</text>
    <text class="ts" x="495" y="294" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Temporal route / SHAP interactions</text>
    <text class="ts" x="495" y="308" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Already captured by depth=10, -0.005</text>
  </g>
  <line x1="495" y1="316" x2="495" y2="340" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrow)" fill="none"/>
  <!-- V9 -->
  <g class="node c-teal" onclick="window.location.href='gen2-en.html#v9'" style="cursor:pointer">
    <rect x="350" y="340" width="290" height="44" rx="8" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text class="th" x="495" y="356" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">V9 TAF forecasts</text>
    <text class="ts" x="495" y="372" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Genuinely new external info | +0.002</text>
  </g>
  <!-- V10-V12 -->
  <line x1="185" y1="384" x2="270" y2="420" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrow)" fill="none"/>
  <line x1="495" y1="384" x2="410" y2="420" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrow)" fill="none"/>
  <g class="node c-gray" onclick="window.location.href='gen2-en.html#v10v12'" style="cursor:pointer">
    <rect x="160" y="420" width="360" height="44" rx="8" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text class="th" x="340" y="436" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">V10-V12 All negative</text>
    <text class="ts" x="340" y="452" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Target encoding / NOTEARS / Delay absorption</text>
  </g>
  <line x1="340" y1="464" x2="340" y2="488" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrow)" fill="none"/>
  <!-- V9c -->
  <g class="node c-purple" onclick="window.location.href='gen2-en.html#v9c'" style="cursor:pointer">
    <rect x="160" y="488" width="360" height="56" rx="8" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text class="th" x="340" y="508" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">V9c Finalized: Temporal fix</text>
    <text class="ts" x="340" y="524" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Tail chain uses actual arrival time</text>
    <text class="ts" x="340" y="538" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">AUC 0.7418 (Gen2 final result)</text>
  </g>
  <line x1="340" y1="544" x2="340" y2="568" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrow)" fill="none"/>
  <!-- Phase 1-4 -->
  <g class="node c-blue" onclick="window.location.href='gen2-en.html#phases'" style="cursor:pointer">
    <rect x="160" y="568" width="360" height="56" rx="8" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text class="th" x="340" y="588" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Phase 1-4 Comprehensive Analysis</text>
    <text class="ts" x="340" y="604" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Literature leakage audit | Method reproduction</text>
    <text class="ts" x="340" y="618" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">SHAP (42.8% contribution) | Ablation study</text>
  </g>
  <line x1="340" y1="624" x2="340" y2="658" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrow)" fill="none"/>
  <text x="354" y="644" font-size="12" dominant-baseline="central">Public data replication</text>
  <!-- GEN 3 HEADER -->
  <g class="node c-coral" onclick="window.location.href='gen3-en.html'" style="cursor:pointer">
    <rect x="160" y="658" width="360" height="44" rx="8" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text class="th" x="340" y="674" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Gen3: Public BTS Replication</text>
    <text class="ts" x="340" y="690" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">19.15M flights | All US carriers | Reproducible</text>
  </g>
  <line x1="340" y1="702" x2="340" y2="726" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrow)" fill="none"/>
  <!-- Gen3 SHAP -->
  <g class="node c-coral" onclick="window.location.href='gen3-en.html#shap'" style="cursor:pointer">
    <rect x="160" y="726" width="360" height="56" rx="8" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text class="th" x="340" y="746" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">SHAP Source-Group Analysis</text>
    <text class="ts" x="340" y="762" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Tail chain 35.5% | Schedule 18.6%</text>
    <text class="ts" x="340" y="776" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">AUC 0.7681 (chimera model)</text>
  </g>
  <line x1="280" y1="782" x2="210" y2="822" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrow)" fill="none"/>
  <line x1="400" y1="782" x2="470" y2="822" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrow)" fill="none"/>
  <!-- Schedule -->
  <g class="node c-amber" onclick="window.location.href='gen3-en.html#schedule'" style="cursor:pointer">
    <rect x="60" y="822" width="260" height="56" rx="8" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text class="th" x="190" y="842" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Schedule Dominance</text>
    <text class="ts" x="190" y="858" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Delays predictable from schedule alone</text>
    <text class="ts" x="190" y="872" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">First rigorous validation in literature</text>
  </g>
  <!-- Weather -->
  <g class="node c-amber" onclick="window.location.href='gen3-en.html#weather'" style="cursor:pointer">
    <rect x="360" y="822" width="260" height="56" rx="8" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    <text class="th" x="490" y="842" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Weather Near-Zero</text>
    <text class="ts" x="490" y="858" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Weather ineffective after leakage control</text>
    <text class="ts" x="490" y="872" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central">Literature may overestimate weather</text>
  </g>
</svg>
```
